description: CompositionWhite jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck, front zipper closure, long sleeves with adidas patented 3-Stripes running down the shoulders to the cuffs in red and black, ribbed cuffs and hem, zippered pockets on the front waist, Milan soccer club badge appliqued on the left chest over red and black stripes and embroidered branding on the right chestFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this jacket from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants and sports shoes for a sporty look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
